entries.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entries.description: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entries.title: for-developers-plugin

entries.title: compliance-support
entries.description: A Claude Code plugin for engineers who write PCI cardholder-data code. It blocks hardcoded secrets and weak crypto as the code is written, and reviews changed code for PII in logs and money-moving actions with no audit trail when the turn ends.

entries.title: genius-skills

entries.title: software-engineer
entries.description: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin that automates the full software development lifecycle — database → backend → frontend → testing → security scan → git commit. Each domain agent keeps its own knowledge base and learns across sessions. Uses the host IDE's models (orchestrator on the main model, mechanical sub-agents on cheaper models); no API keys or local Ollama required.

entries.title: outset

entries.title: ecommerce-observations
entries.description: Live ride-along recorder/reporter for ecommerce shopping. Observes your real browsing session (or drives it yourself in --drive mode) across the funnel (landing → search → category → PDP → cart → checkout), capturing flow, findability, friction, GTM/dataLayer tracking gaps, WebMCP agent-readiness, and named patterns (B2C and B2B/B2B2C) with fast quick-mark notes, then synthesizes a dive report with a visual funnel storyboard.

entries.title: brand-content-design
entries.description: Create branded visual content (presentations, carousels, infographics, HTML pages) with Aaker personality-driven design, style recommendation engine, visual components, 26 visual styles, design systems, and Presentation Zen principles

entries.title: problem-based-srs
entries.description: Problem-Based Software Requirements Specification methodology for AI-assisted requirements engineering. Provides structured approach to capture Customer Problems (WHY), Customer Needs (WHAT), and Functional Requirements (HOW) with full traceability.

entries.title: mtrojer
entries.description: Personal Claude Code plugin: agent-attention tmux integration and the shared dotfiles skills suite (commit, brainstorm, plan, council, caveman, summarize, tmux, and friends).

entries.title: beagle
entries.description: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entries.title: learn-skills
entries.description: Agent skills that package evidence-backed pedagogical methodologies (explain-and-check, quiz-me, connect-to-what-you-know, ask-me-questions, learn-by-doing, linked-notes, flashcards) as workflows applied to code. The anti-cognitive-surrender layer: closes the comprehension gap that opens when an LLM has done the work on the human's behalf.

entries.title: yaml-to-html
entries.description: Two skills that turn a document, repo summary, PR/diff, README, design note, or spec into an offline HTML explainer bundle. generate-explainer-yaml captures meaning (core.yaml) + presentation strategy (view.yaml); generate-explainer-html builds a light/dark bundle whose right pane switches between additive iframe views, with copyable prompts that ask a local-file-reading AI to add more views.

entries.title: laravel-vue-superpowers
entries.description: Laravel + Vue 3 (Composition API) + Inertia v3 + Reka UI + Tailwind CSS 4 + Pest 4 + Scout/Meilisearch specialist toolkit for Claude Code. 10 specialist agents, 7 stack-enhanced skills, 13 enforcement & context hooks, 1 slash command. Every specialist verifies APIs against the installed vendor/ (or node_modules/) source — ground truth, not docs.

entries.title: claudeclaw2
entries.description: Multi-channel bridge for Claude Code: per-channel tmux-hosted agents driven by Telegram / Discord / Slack / LINE

entries.title: gemini-manager
entries.description: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entries.title: eidos
entries.description: Spec-driven development plugin for Claude Code. Markdown specs as the source of truth, code downstream.

entries.title: patina
entries.description: Detect and rewrite AI writing patterns in Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese so text reads as if a human wrote it. Meaning-preservation (MPS) verified, audit-friendly. The root SKILL.md is loaded as the /patina skill.

entries.title: grimoire
entries.description: Grimoire — a composing suite of Agent Skills distilling the R-Ladies guide (guide.rladies.org) into on-demand spells for the community and global team: apply the R-Ladies brand and voice, write and translate blog posts, draft and schedule social media, coordinate abstract review, run chapters and events, maintain the website, and run pre-human-review checks the R-Ladies way.

entries.description: Menu bar status indicator for Claude Code: animated spark, elapsed timer, and open/close lifecycle.

entries.title: memor-re

entries.title: edator
entries.description: Record once. Claude makes the edit decisions, FFmpeg executes them. An AI co-producer that cuts your raw footage into a finished video — deterministically.

entries.title: agent-swarm
entries.description: Orchestration skill: make the current session a controller that spawns Codex/Claude/Hermes worker agents in tmux, tracks them in a TSV registry, tails logs, sends input, and reviews output.

entries.title: freeflow
entries.description: Lightweight workflow for coding agents. Conversation, workflow, and strict-workflow skills for planning, execution, review, verification, handoff, and decision capture.

entries.title: plur
entries.description: Persistent, local-first shared memory for AI agents. Corrections, preferences, and conventions persist across sessions, tools, and machines — stored as plain YAML on your disk, with zero-cost local search.

entries.title: sparq
entries.description: Usage skills for the sparq RDF triplestore + SPARQL 1.1/1.2 engine (Rust/CLI/HTTP/Python/WASM + reasoning, SHACL, full-text, vector, GeoSPARQL, RSP-QL, ZK query proofs).

entries.title: vts-local-orchestrator
entries.description: Delegate cheap code-location to ANY local LLM (Ollama, full-GPU) that drives vs-token-safer's vs-search tools — so Claude spends its tokens on reasoning, not raw search output. Model-agnostic (default gemma4:e4b). Ships the qvts CLI, a live web dashboard with a 3-way token-savings panel, and an auto-loading delegation-routing skill.

entries.title: ledger
entries.description: Execution as Proof for money — the deterministic correctness layer AI agents call. Exact Money.from (no floats), kernel-enforced double-entry via JournalEntry + validateEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, canon citations. Provides /ledger-* skills and slash commands.

entries.title: ai-handoff
entries.description: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entries.title: planwright
entries.description: Autopilot for spec-driven development. The human signs off and merges; planwright flies the spec.

entries.title: afk-issues
entries.description: Work tracker issues to reviewed GitHub pull requests. afk-issues runs a batch unattended; grab-issue takes a single issue supervised. GitHub by default; pluggable to Jira and others via a repo adapter doc. Both skills dispatch the issue-worker agent.

entries.title: gooseworks
entries.description: 100+ data tools for scraping, research, lead generation, and enrichment. Search Twitter/X, Reddit, LinkedIn, find emails, enrich companies, and more — all from your coding agent.

entries.title: misfire
entries.description: Tells you which of your existing CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules prose rules your agents demonstrably ignore, ranked from your own run history, and scaffolds a deterministic hook for the violated convertible subset — keeping safety rules as prose. Deterministic, zero-LLM, observer-only: never auto-deletes, never auto-applies, never writes settings.json.

entries.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

Each skill is self-contained. Load with `claude --plugin-dir <path-to-this-repo>`.

entries.title: unlok

entries.title: t-tools

entries.title: odoo-ai-skills
entries.description: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-K discovery solves the cold-start problem — rank the live entrypoint surface (buttons/crons/automations/routes), sample the real cross-app flow as an Execution Surface Graph, measure hallucination reduction against a benchmark, and ENFORCE no-introspect-no-edit via a PreToolUse hook. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entries.title: sota-skills
entries.description: State-of-the-art engineering skills (2026) for building and auditing software across 36 domains and languages — security, architecture, APIs, databases, cloud, Kubernetes, observability, testing, LLM engineering, UX writing, copywriting, and more — with a master router and BUILD/AUDIT modes (37 skills).

entries.title: oats-skills
entries.description: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entries.title: abu-context-engineering
entries.description: Research-first context engineering workflows for Claude Code and Codex, including prototype reintegration and goal prompts before implementation planning.

entries.title: todos
entries.description: Per-project todo tracking with a relational project-knowledge brain — decisions, business rules, contradictions, stakeholders, scope changes — and a local broadsheet dashboard at localhost:5757. Plan, sync, build, design, and close out implementation work; capture decisions/rules/contradictions to remember later.

entries.title: unified-bug-hunter
entries.description: Scope-safe, memory-backed bug-bounty & red-team plugin for Claude Code — 89 skills, 45 commands, 31 agents, and 6 MCP servers that orchestrate real offensive tooling (subfinder/httpx/nuclei/dalfox/sqlmap/Foundry) with distilled methodology, false-positive discipline, a deterministic fail-closed scope checker, and cross-target pattern learning. Skills auto-load by topic; reports never auto-submit.

entries.title: yana-ai
entries.description: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entries.title: atl

entries.title: persona-lab
entries.description: A multi-persona operating model for single-human-driven autonomous SDLC.

entries.title: sf-intelligence
entries.description: MCP-first, offline-first hybrid knowledge base for a Salesforce org. Resolve-first routing, coverage-aware destructive verdicts, opt-in live read-only plane. Ask sfi.capabilities for the live tool map.

entries.title: devflow
entries.description: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entries.title: loom
entries.description: Loom — meta-orchestration platform for Claude Code. Plans, executes, reviews, and tests software changes with multi-agent pipelines, hook-enforced contracts, and a pull-on-demand library.
